tools.name: format_resume
tools.description: Use when the user wants to: format their resume, make it look good/better/professional/nicer/appealing/presentable, put it in a template, clean it up, create a resume from their info, or get a resume PDF. Creates ATS-optimized, recruiter-tested layouts that work for all industries. Do NOT use for: writing content, reviewing, giving feedback, tailoring to jobs, or adding keywords - only for formatting existing content.

tools.name: track_widget_event
tools.description: Internal: tracks widget engagement events. Not for model use.
